@sigil v0 hybrid
G: refactor(loadUser) async_await promisify(db.findUser) await(audit.log) await(cache.set)
C: same_order ∧ one_next(err) ∧ preserve(async) ∧ preserve(await) ∧ preserve(next(err))
P: !id → next(new Error('missing_id')) ∧ db.findUser(id) → err→next(err) ∧ !user → next(new Error('not_found')) ∧ audit.log(user.id) → logErr→next(logErr) ∧ cache.set(user.id,user) → cacheErr→next(cacheErr) ∧ success→next(null,user)
V: validation_order(id→err→user→audit→cache) ∧ one_place_maps_db_errors_to_next(err)
R: ! change semantics
A: async function loadUser(id, next) { if (!id) return next(new Error('missing_id')); try { const user = await promisify(db.findUser)(id); if (!user) return next(new Error('not_found')); await promisify
